project.component: { "keyToString": { "Gradle.Build Dev.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Dev [clean].executor": "Run", "Gradle.Dev [test].executor": "Run", "Gradle.Download Sources.executor": "Run", "Gradle.SimpleTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.SimpleTest.testSimple.executor": "Run", "Gradle.TimeSequenceParserTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.TimeSequenceParserTest.parseShort should parse Russian locale time strings correctly.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder0": "0", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder1": "1", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth0": "75", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth1": "75", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.zencoder-patch-add-chat-message-raw-content": "true", "RunOnceActivity.zencoder-patch-generate-chat-message-id": "true", "RunOnceActivity.zencoder-patch-migrate-custom-instruction": "true", "RunOnceActivity.zencoder-patch-migrate-repo-info-to-rules": "true", "Spring Boot.SablebotWorkerApplication.executor": "Run", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/mr-17", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "pProject Default", "run.configurations.included.in.services": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "postgresql" ] } }

configuration.name: TimeSequenceParserTest.parseShort should parse Russian locale time strings correctly

option.value: "ru.sablebot.common.utils.TimeSequenceParserTest.parseShort should parse Russian locale time strings correctly"

item.itemvalue: Gradle.TimeSequenceParserTest.parseShort should parse Russian locale time strings correctly
Gradle.TimeSequenceParserTest.parseShort should parse Russian locale time strings correctly

task.summary: Add work with buttons (not perfect but works) Add work with select menus Add word with modal (not completely)
added error catching replace GlobalScope to messageScope fix context in TestCommand.kt make some functions suspend

Some fixes Fixed PingCommand.kt shard numeration Add in TestCommand.kt new field Add `stringSelectMenu` and `buttonForUser` in InteractivityManager.kt Migrate from `coroutineLauncher.messageScope` to `coroutineLauncher.launchMessageJob(event)` in InteractionEventsListener.kt
Try to implement DSL style commands
Try to implement DSL style commands
After I forget to commit changes registration doesn't work
Add new command, metrics and other
Add GulagService.kt and dome support functions at InteractivityManager.kt
Add GulagService.kt and dome support functions at InteractivityManager.kt
Add GulagService.kt and dome support functions at InteractivityManager.kt
